title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 10.10.2023
summary:
Main
Capesize spot rates reach 16-month highs amid a tighter Atlantic market - Once again, dry bulk
Source: Breakwave Advisors

BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
October 10, 2023
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,586 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,929 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 14.6% ↑ 30D: 78.4% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 55.6% ↑ YTD: 27.3% Sentiment: Negative
↓ YOY: -2.2% ↓ YOY: -3.2% Fundamentals: Positive
Bi-Weekly Report
• Capesize spot rates reach 16-month highs amid a tighter Atlantic market - Once again, dry bulk volatility comes
back with a vengeance as supply/demand balance in the Atlantic is now tilted towards stronger rates for the
foreseeable future. Such a shift comes despite an unfavorable macro picture, with China continuing to suffer from
weak steel demand (although we believe this is about to change as discussed below). Freight futures clearly
